summary: VitalFlow UX Improvements - All 11 frontend tests passed. Verified: manual data button removed, sync indicator visible, connection status dot working, gamification bar showing, Painel RH desktop-only, ConnectDevices button contrast improved (solid green/red), GestorDashboard mobile/desktop responsive, empty state shows 'Conectar Dispositivo'.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 or 0 - cosmetic issue, charts render correctly after initial load

frontend: Dashboard: No 'Adicionar Dados' button exists - completely removed
Navbar: Connection status dot visible next to VitalFlow logo (data-testid='connection-status') - green pulsing dot
Navbar: Gamification bar shows points (300) and streak (1 dia) (data-testid='gamification-bar')
Navbar: 'Painel RH' button visible on desktop for Gestor user (hidden md:flex)
Navbar: 'Painel RH' button hidden on mobile (verified with 375x812 viewport)
Navbar: Sync indicator hidden on mobile (hidden sm:flex)
ConnectDevices: Connect buttons use solid green bg (bg-emerald-500) - high contrast verified
ConnectDevices: Disconnect buttons use solid red bg (bg-rose-600) - high contrast verified
GestorDashboard: Shows 'disponivel apenas no desktop' message on mobile viewport (375x812)
GestorDashboard: Shows full dashboard on desktop viewport (1920x800) - V-Score, Stress, Charts, Export visible
Dashboard: Empty state shows 'Conectar Dispositivo' button (data-testid='connect-wearable-button') instead of 'Iniciar Primeira Analise'
backend: Backend API root endpoint responding: /api/ returns VitalFlow API message
Protected endpoints correctly require authentication (401 for unauthenticated requests)

context_for_next_testing_agent: VitalFlow UX improvements fully tested. Key changes verified: (1) Manual data button removed from Dashboard, (2) 'Sincronizado com wearables' text in navbar, (3) ConnectionStatus component with green/yellow/red pulsing dot, (4) GestorDashboard responsive - mobile shows 'disponivel apenas no desktop', (5) ConnectDevices buttons have high contrast solid colors (emerald-500/rose-600). Legacy files already removed in previous iteration.
mocked_apis: ConnectionStatus offline mode uses localStorage as cache (no real service worker)
POST /api/wearables/oauth/callback (simulated OAuth - no real Google Fit/Apple HealthKit)

feature_1.name: Manual data button removed
feature_1.details: No 'Adicionar Dados' button on Dashboard - replaced with wearable sync flow

feature_3.name: Connection status dot
feature_3.details: Green pulsing dot next to VitalFlow logo (data-testid='connection-status')

feature_4.name: ConnectDevices button contrast
feature_4.details: Connect: bg-emerald-500 (solid green), Disconnect: bg-rose-600 (solid red)

feature_5.name: GestorDashboard responsive
feature_5.details: Mobile (375x812): shows 'disponivel apenas no desktop'. Desktop (1920x800): full dashboard visible

feature_6.name: Painel RH desktop-only
feature_6.details: Button uses 'hidden md:flex' - visible on desktop, hidden on mobile

feature_7.name: Empty state button
feature_7.details: Shows 'Conectar Dispositivo' (data-testid='connect-wearable-button') instead of 'Iniciar Primeira Analise'
